//: Manifests synchronized by `npm run version-sync`. Source of truth is mcp-server/package.json unless --version is passed. Paths are relative to the repo root.

manifests.//: Top-level manifest has no `version` field today; included so future schema changes are picked up automatically.

readme.//: Opt-in via --readme flag. Pattern matches v3.11.5 / Version 3.11.5 / agent-flywheel@3.11.5 / vX.Y.Z badges. Best-effort regex sweep.
